<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>

<li>gallbladder mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>rete ovarii adenocarcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>secretory uterine corpus endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
